title: lonchocarpus angusticarpus
intro: Lonchocarpus angusticarpus, also known as the narrow-fruited Lonchocarpus, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. Traditionally, the plant's seeds and pods have been used in folk medicine, known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The seeds of Lonchocarpus angusticarpus have been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antidiabetic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, infusions, and decoctions, often used to treat conditions like hypertension, diabetes, and gastrointestinal disorders.
